# notify_cancel | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Darwin Notify ](/documentation/darwinnotify)

- [ notify_cancel ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_cancel)

-  notify_cancel 

Function# notify_cancel

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
extern uint32_t notify_cancel(int token);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_cancel#parameters)

`token`(Input) notification token

## [Return Value](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_cancel#return-value)

Returns status.

## [Discussion](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_cancel#Discussion)

Cancel notification and free resources associated with a notification token. Mach ports and file descriptor associated with a token are released (deallocated or closed) when all registration tokens associated with the port or file descriptor have been cancelled.
